message:
fix(llm-router,plaid): correct test assertions for routing decisions and redacted debug

- llm-router: assert dispatch_required and dispatch_instruction instead
  of response — the router returns routing decisions, not LLM responses
- plaid: update LinkExchangeResponse Debug test to expect [REDACTED]
  for access_token and assert the raw token does not appear in output,
  aligning with the security-hardening custom Debug impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
